rulings.Case Title: SARGENT, CATHERINE, AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR, AND AS et al VS. EATON CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 6, 2014 IN DEPARTMENT 503, LINE 1, Defendant Rockwell Automation, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/TLJ)
